title: Ladder Deployer
description: This mod adds a mechanism block that extends a ladder downward when a signal is triggered.
body:
![ladder_deployer_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fad612fd0e801c431ecd7b0ad7b14cd9d702547.png)

# About
Our mod adds the ability to build stair columns of various lengths right beneath you! Like any mechanism, you can activate it using a redstone signal!

Thanks to the block's **visual design**, you can easily **determine the side** where your stairs will be placed:

![ladder_deployer_with_mechanisms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ad3174e5091866d586b5c890dbf6c10e1e1e70.png)

You can also install Eureka and Valkyrien Skies to place ladders while in flight **(OPTIONAL)**. 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Please note:** Our mod works with Eureka and Valkyrien Skies without actually including or modifying their code. They interact with our systems, but their own source code stays exactly as it is.
</details>
